use std::io::Read;
use std::net::TcpStream;

// BAD: unbounded read then parse
fn handle_connection(mut stream: TcpStream) -> Result<(), Error> {
    let mut buf = String::new();
    stream.read_to_string(&mut buf)?; // reads until EOF, no size limit

    let request: Request = serde_json::from_str(&buf)?;
    process_request(request);
    Ok(())
}

fn load_and_parse(path: &str) -> Result<Data, Error> {
    let content = std::fs::read_to_string(path)?; // no size limit
    let data: Data = serde_json::from_str(&content)?;
    Ok(data)
}

fn read_request(body: &mut dyn Read) -> Result<Request, Error> {
    let mut buf = Vec::new();
    body.read_to_end(&mut buf)?; // no size limit
    let request: Request = serde_json::from_slice(&buf)?;
    Ok(request)
}
